mapper.select: SELECT * FROM T_TOPO_SUBNET ORDER BY LAYER, NAME
mapper.update: UPDATE T_TOPO_SUBNET SET NAME = #{name}, DISPLAY_NAME = #{displayName}, ADDRESS = #{address}, LOCATION = #{location}, MAINTAINER = #{maintainer}, CONTACT = #{contact}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime} WHERE DN = #{dn}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM T_TOPO_SUBNET WHERE DN = #{dn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_TOPO_NE WHERE PARENT_DN = #{parentDn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_TOPO_SUBNET WHERE PARENT_DN = #{parentDn}
SELECT * FROM T_TOPO_SUBNET WHERE IS_MERGE_GROUP = true
SELECT * FROM T_TOPO_SUBNET WHERE PARENT_DN = #{parentDn} AND IS_MERGE_GROUP = true
mapper.update: UPDATE T_TOPO_SUBNET SET PARENT_DN = #{parentDn}, LAYER = #{layer}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime} WHERE DN = #{dn}
